module.name: derivation
module.description: A step-by-step derivation: a column of expressions with a reason next to each step. Body = one step per section, "expr | reason".
module.aiSpec:
A step-by-step DERIVATION / calculation — each line is an expression with the reason for that step beside it. Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`, one step per section written `expression | reason` (the reason is optional). Write the expression as inline math with \( \); usually each line after the first starts with `=`.
Parameters: • color (color, default var(--accent-color)) — color of the reason text (and step numbers). • size (select: sm | md | lg, default md) — overall text scale. • numbered (boolean, default false) — prefix each step with an equation number (1), (2)… • hlast (boolean, default false) — emphasize (bold) the final step as the result.
Example: <!-- @derivation numbered: true, hlast: true --> \((a+b)^2\) | expand <!-- @ --> \(= a^2 + 2ab + b^2\) | binomial <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Reason color
param.desc: Color of the reason text and step numbers

param.name: numbered
param.label: Numbered
param.desc: Prefix each step with an equation number (1), (2)…

param.name: hlast
param.label: Highlight result
param.desc: Emphasize (bold) the final step as the result

snippet.label: Derivation (steps + reasons)
snippet.text: <!-- @derivation --> \(\frac{d}{dx}(x^2 \sin x)\) | product rule <!-- @ --> \(= 2x \sin x + x^2 \cos x\) | differentiate <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Aligned steps; each section is "expression | reason" (reason optional).
